name: Ma Credit Income Trust
analysis: MA1's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 0% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$1.9900. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.9900, stop A$1.9256, target A$2.1833 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
